overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a covered cyberpunk market arcade with neon signage, transitioning into a bright open dock area with shipping containers and a large cargo ship. The footage features high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and detailed industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market arcade with clothing stalls and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market arcade, passing by clothing stalls and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a large yellow bag walking past the camera
individual browsing items at a clothing stall

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement displaying a motorcycle rider
billboard featuring guitar and keyboard musical instruments
large pink neon sign with 'WATSON WHORE' text
teal neon arrow sign mounted on building facade
lattice metal roof structure covering the market walkway
market stall with hanging garments and display mannequins
black corporate signage with 'DELAMAIN' text and logo

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered cyberpunk market arcade sheltered by a metal lattice roof. Neon signs including 'WATSON WHORE' and various product billboards cast colored light onto the concrete walkway. The character passes clothing stalls and scattered pedestrians in this commercial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock area with shipping containers and cargo ship

events.description: exits covered market arcade into open dock area with large cargo ship visible
lighting shifts from shaded neon-mix to bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered market into the bright sunlight of the dock area, continuing forward past concrete barriers

notable_agents.action: dock worker in red headwear standing near concrete barriers
armed individual gesturing with weapon while walking

entered.detail: massive red and white cargo ship docked at the harbor
stacked colorful shipping containers in green, blue, and red
angled concrete barriers arranged across the dock pavement
billboard displaying 'FOR YOU' text with green character graphic

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered market into a bright, open dock area dominated by a massive red cargo ship and colorful shipping containers. The environment shifts from enclosed commercial space to exposed industrial waterfront. The character walks along the concrete dock past scattered workers and concrete barriers under clear blue skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered, neon-lit commercial corridor into a bright, expansive industrial waterfront. It begins by moving through a covered cyberpunk market arcade, where a metal lattice roof shelters clothing stalls and pedestrians under the glow of colorful billboards and signs. As the character advances, the enclosed space opens up, shifting the lighting from artificial neon hues to the brilliant glare of a clear blue sky. The scene then expands into a vast dock area, passing concrete barriers and workers before revealing a massive red cargo ship surrounded by colorful shipping containers.
